evals.prompt: Inspect the active agent-browser workspace before making changes, and tell me which durable workspace files exist before you look at runtime artifacts.
evals.expected_output: Starts from render panes and worktree items, then inspects workspace files before session filesystems.
expectations: The workflow starts from the active workspace rather than broad filesystem scans
Workspace files are prioritized before session filesystems

evals.prompt: Edit the default create-agent skill inside the active workspace copy without duplicating it into a session filesystem.
evals.expected_output: Finds the bundled skill under the workspace copy, reads it, and updates it in place.
expectations: The workflow targets the workspace copy under .agents/skills
The result updates the durable file instead of copying it elsewhere

evals.prompt: Take a durable workspace skill file and make it available inside a mounted session filesystem for runtime use.
evals.expected_output: Uses the link-durable-file workflow and creates a symlink instead of duplicating content.
expectations: The deterministic workflow resolves to link-durable-file
The durable file is linked rather than copied
